title: SubscriptionUpdateRequest
description: Request body for updating an existing subscription.

payment_method_token.description: New payment method token to use for future billing cycles.

payment_method_nonce.description: A nonce for a new payment method to vault and use for future billing cycles.

plan_id.description: Change the subscription to a different billing plan.

price.description: Override the subscription price for future billing cycles.

number_of_billing_cycles.description: Update the total number of billing cycles for the subscription.

never_expires.description: If true, the subscription continues indefinitely.

billing_day_of_month.description: Update the day of the month on which charges occur.

options.description: Options for the subscription update behavior.

prorate_charges.description: If true, applies prorated charges or credits for the current billing cycle when the price changes mid-cycle.

replace_all_add_ons.description: If true, replaces all existing add-ons on the subscription with the provided add-ons collection.

replace_all_discounts.description: If true, replaces all existing discounts on the subscription with the provided discounts collection.

revert_subscription_on_proration_failure.description: If true, reverts the subscription update if the prorated charge fails.
